T

TableNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.Restaurant
The table number.
TacDefault - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Specifies the acquirer’s conditions that cause a transaction to be rejected if it might have been approved online, but the terminal is unable to process the transaction online
TacDenial - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Specifies the acquirer’s conditions that cause the denial of a transaction without attempt to go online
TacOnline - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Specifies the acquirer’s conditions that cause a transaction to be transmitted
TagList - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
List of requested tags.
TagList - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
List of tags which have been set successfully.
TAK - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse.GetPEDInfoResponse
An array of Terminal MAC Key info.
TargetDevice - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Used to update the firmware of the specified device.
TaxAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
Tax Amount.
TaxAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.TaxDetail
Tax Amount.
TaxAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Tax amount, $$$$$$$CC, if field is NULL, and terminal supports commercial card, terminal prompts dialog to enter it.
TaxAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The tax amount, $$$$$$$CC.
if the field is NULL, and terminal supports commercial card, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it.

TaxExempt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The indicator of tax exempt.
0: not exempt.
1:exempt

The tax exempt id.

It is used to specify the serial number for the account where the card token is stored.

Track1Data - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Track1 data or tag 56, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
Track1Data - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Track1 data used to return nonpayment card track data.
Track2Data - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Track2 data or tag 57 (Track 2 Equivalent Data), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled
Track2Data - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Track2 data used to return nonpayment card track data.
Track3Data - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Track3 data, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
Track3Data - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Track3 data used to return nonpayment card track data.
TrackDataSentinel - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
This is used to indicate the response track 1 and track 2 data whether need to include start and end sentinels for magnetic swipe transaction.
TrailerId - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Also called “Trailer Number” or “Trailer License Number”.

Also called “Trailer Number” or “Trailer License Number”.

9A: Transaction Date Format is YYMMDD.

A unique transaction identifier from bank/card brand.

Transaction Integrity Class is assigned by MasterCard for a U.S.
TransactionIntegrityClass - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Transaction Integrity Class is assigned by MasterCard for a U.S.
TransactionRemainingAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Any amount of the original authorization remaining after this void/refund, $$$$$$$CC.
TransactionRemainingAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Any amount of the original authorization remaining after this void/refund, $$$$$$CC.
TransactionResultType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Filter included transaction by Transaction Result.
TransactionSequenceNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Transaction Sequence Number.
Counter maintained by the terminal that is incremented by one for each transaction
TransactionTime - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
9F21: Transaction Time format is HHMMSS.
TransactionType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MOTOECommerce
MOTO/e-Commerce transaction type.
TransDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
Original Transaction Date in YYYYMMDD format.
Conditional for some hosts for subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
TransID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
TransID for Visa or AmExTranID for AMEX.
TransId - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
Deprecated.

TransTime - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original

Tvr - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
